description: Style NoteA deconstructed boat shoe in plush leather with franco leone's innovative design details for the summer - a perforated upper and a shorter tongue (for maximum foot exposure) We especially love the lace up detail that goes around the mouth of the shoe - a twist in the classic design indeed!Product DetailsRounded toe cap, low top shoe in blue-grey with an upraised heel and a single hole lace upLeather upper with perforations all over and metal eyeletsMildly padded footbedPU midsole with faux-greased lookRubber outsole with herringbone groves all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
